name: Insufficient Resource Pool
description: The product's resource pool (connection pool, thread pool, file handle pool) is not large enough to handle peak demand, allowing an attacker to exhaust the pool with a relatively large number of requests and deny service to legitimate users.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node opens or claims resources from a STRUCTURAL[resource_pool] node (connection pool, thread pool, session pool) that has a fixed or insufficiently sized capacity, without a CONTROL node enforcing per-client limits, queuing, or graceful degradation under load
